Key Finding Citation: Notably, we observed at least a twofold increase of variant allele expressions in 3.9%, 12.9% and 5.9% of mutations from SMGs in AML (for example, TP53 , STAG2 and SMC3 ), BRCA (for example, CDH1 , TP53 , GATA3 and MLL3 ), and UCEC (for example, ARID1A and FGFR2 ), respectively ( Supplementary Table 11a ).

Key Finding: WT1 is part of a set of genes (TP53, PIK3CA, PIK3R1, SETD2, WT1) identified with strong mutual exclusivity in the Pan-Cancer dataset.
Key Finding Citation: When 600 non-cancer-type-specific genes were added to the analysis (Methods), we identified another set consisting of TP53 , PIK3CA , PIK3R1 , SETD2 and WT1 ( P < 0.01; Extended Data Fig. 5b and Supplementary Table 7 ).
